params.data: CRSP NYSE cap decile 10 (largest stocks, lowest historical beta ~0.85)
params.signal: always long low-beta proxy (large cap decile 10)
params.note: True BAB factor requires individual stock betas. CRSP 10_crsp_market_portfolios.parquet has size deciles, not beta deciles. Decile 10 (largest cap) historically has beta ~0.85 vs market and lower volatility. Period: 1970-2025.
